Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.462

Title: Relates to the staffing and operations of a cancer research institute and a related not-for-profit corporation
Summary: Transfers the Buffalo Division of Health Research, Inc. to the Roswell Park Cancer Research Corporation.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the state finance law, in relation to the staffing and operations of a cancer research institute and a related not-for-profit corporation
